name: Spaghetti Squash with Bolognese Sauce
recipeInstructions:
Place the whole spaghetti squash in a microwave-safe baking dish, 9x13 inches.
Microwave on HIGH for 10 minutes. Halve the squash lengthwise. Remove seeds and membrane. Place the squash cut side up in the same baking dish. Add 1/3 cup water. Cover with vented plastic wrap. Microwave on HIGH for 12 minutes, giving the dish a half turn once. Let stand, covered, for 2 minutes. Scrape the squash from the shell with a fork onto a platter, fluffing to separate strands.
Meanwhile, cook the sausage in oil in a large saucepan, breaking up the meat, for 6 minutes until browned. Add carrots, garlic, tomatoes, tomato paste, basil, and 2 tbsp parsley. Cover; simmer for 15 minutes. Spoon spaghetti squash onto plates. Top with sauce. Garnish with parsley and grated parmesan cheese.
